EXPLANATION: The book "Mining of Massive Data Sets" by Jure Leskovec, Anand Rajaraman, and Jeffrey David Ullman is confirmed as a real, well-known textbook published by Cambridge University Press in 2020 (3rd edition). It is listed on Google Books and Open Library with matching title, authors, publisher, and year.
LINK: https://books.google.com/books/about/Mining_of_Massive_Data_Sets.html?id=S4HCDwAAQBAJ
FOUND_TITLE: Mining of Massive Data Sets
FOUND_AUTHORS: Jure Leskovec, Anand Rajaraman, Jeffrey David Ullman
FOUND_YEAR: 2020
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
